items.raw_excerpt: Today's word is, unfortunately, a not uncommon part of Swedish summer.

items.raw_excerpt: Albalat dels Sorells vivirá el próximo 27 de junio una de las propuestas de ocio juvenil más singulares del año. La Concejalía de Juventud del Ayuntamiento, en colaboración con WRG World Real G...
items.summary_en: Albalat dels Sorells will host an unusual youth leisure event on June 27: a six-hour nighttime zombie survival game. The town council's youth department is organizing the activity with WRG World Real Game.
items.title_en: Zombies to Invade a Valencia Village for Six Hours of Night Survival
items.title_original: Los zombies invadirán un pueblo de Valencia: seis horas de supervivencia en una noche inaudita - elperiodic.com

items.raw_excerpt: Alkmaar is famous among tourists for its cheese market – a re-enactment of how cheese used to be assessed and sold – which is staged every summer season for foreign visitors. But it would be wrong to dismiss Alkmaar because of that. The city has a charming old centre, is close to the dunes and the seaside, and has plenty as a base to keep a weekend or mid-week visitor happy. The earliest written mention of Alkmaar dates back to...
items.summary_en: Alkmaar is known for its tourist cheese market, but the Dutch city also has a charming historic center and easy access to dunes and the seaside. The excerpt presents it as a pleasant base for a weekend or mid-week visit beyond its famous cheese tradition.
items.title_en: Dutch Destinations: Alkmaar Has More Than Cheese
items.title_original: Dutch destinations: there is more to Alkmaar than cheese

items.raw_excerpt: Everyday commerce is beginning to fray as financial institutions shift focus to digital services across rural Canada
items.summary_en: A small town in Ontario is worried about the local impact of losing its last remaining bank branch. The closure reflects a broader shift toward digital banking that is straining everyday commerce in rural Canada.
items.title_en: A small Ontario town fears collapse as its last bank branch closes
items.title_original: A small Ontario town fears collapse as its last bank branch closes - The Globe and Mail

items.raw_excerpt: Archaeologists have uncovered the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever found in the Netherlands, during excavations in the Waalfront district of Nijmegen. The dig, carried out by the archaeology firms RAAP and BAAC on a former industrial site, also turned up housing blocks, streets, luxury townhouses, a tower and tens of thousands of objects, Nijmegen council said. The baths stood in Ulpia Noviomagus, the Roman city on the site of present-day Nijmegen. The site is at least 4,900 square metres –.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists excavating the Waalfront district of Nijmegen have found the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever discovered in the Netherlands. The former industrial site also revealed streets, housing blocks, luxury townhouses, a tower, and tens of thousands of objects from Ulpia Noviomagus.
items.title_en: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands' largest Roman bathhouse
items.title_original: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands’ largest Roman bathhouse

items.raw_excerpt: I en travel hverdag med forventninger fra alle kanter er ungdomsklubben en oase av fritid som følger barna igjennom oppveksten, fra 9-10 år gamle til de…
items.summary_en: Oslo municipality highlights how youth clubs can serve as a calm leisure space for children growing up amid everyday pressures. The piece frames local youth work as a community effort that supports children from around ages 9 or 10 through adolescence.
items.title_en: It Takes a Village to Raise a Child
items.title_original: Det krever en landsby å oppdra et barn - Oslo kommune - Aktuelt

items.raw_excerpt: Helsingin ja Vantaan rajalle aukeaa tänään perjantaina uusi ostoskylä Helsinki Outlet.
items.summary_en: A new shopping village called Helsinki Outlet is opening today on the border between Helsinki and Vantaa. The outlet features dozens of stores where items are always sold at discounted prices.
items.title_en: New Outlet Village Opens on the Helsinki-Vantaa Border
items.title_original: Helsinkiin avautuu tänään kymmenien liikkeiden outlet-kylä, jossa kaikki on aina alennuksessa – tältä siellä näyttää - Ilta-Sanomat

items.raw_excerpt: WienTourismus hat die Bewohner:innen des schottischen Dorfs Dull eingeladen, um im ruhigsten Monat des Jahres zu prüfen, ob die Stadt tatsächlich langweilig ist - und erhält ein klares Urteil.
items.summary_en: Vienna Tourism invited residents of Dull, Scotland, to visit during the city’s quietest month and judge whether Vienna is truly boring. The campaign plays on the English word “dull” and reportedly received a clear verdict from the visitors.
items.title_en: Vienna Lets the Scottish Village of Dull Decide How “Dull” the City Is
items.title_original: Langeweile-Klischee: Wien lässt das schottische Dorf Dull entscheiden, wie "dull" die Stadt ist - Horizont

items.raw_excerpt: El municipio valenciano de Canet d’en Berenguer ha preparado una programación para celebrar las fiestas de San Juan con una propuesta que combinará música en directo, gastronomía, espect...
items.summary_en: Canet d’en Berenguer, a municipality in Valencia, has prepared a San Juan festival program without the traditional bonfires. The town is replacing them with alternatives such as live music, gastronomy, shows, and a zombie night to reduce vandalism risks.
items.title_en: Valencian town replaces San Juan bonfires with new events to prevent vandalism
items.title_original: Un pueblo de Valencia dice 'no' a las hogueras de San Juan para evitar el vandalismo y las sustituye por novedades como una noche zombi - elperiodic.com

items.raw_excerpt: Maakuntakeskuksista Mikkeli verottaa pariskuntia eniten, Helsinki keveimmin.
items.summary_en: A comparison of Finnish municipalities found large differences in how working couples are taxed. Among regional centers, Mikkeli taxes couples the most, while Helsinki has the lightest burden.
items.title_en: Small Finnish town has the lightest tax burden for working couples
items.title_original: Tämä pikkukaupunki verottaa töissä käyviä pariskuntia keveimmin – kuntien välillä on isot erot - Maaseudun Tulevaisuus

items.raw_excerpt: Austria’s dry spring affected farms, with some hay harvests sharply down and pressure building on rivers, groundwater and fields.
items.summary_en: Austria's unusually dry spring has reduced hay harvests in some farming areas. The conditions are also increasing pressure on rivers, groundwater, and fields ahead of summer.
items.title_en: Austria's Dry Spring Puts Pressure on Farms and Water Supplies
items.title_original: Why Austria’s dry spring could affect farms, food and water this summer

items.raw_excerpt: Zell am See im Salzburger Pinzgau wurde vom US-Magazin „Travel + Leisure“ als eine der schönsten Kleinstädte Europas ausgezeichnet, wobei die beeindruckende natürliche Kulisse zwischen dem Zeller See und den Hohen Tauern hervorgehoben wird.
items.summary_en: Zell am See in Salzburg’s Pinzgau region was recognized by Travel + Leisure as one of Europe’s most beautiful small towns. The praise highlighted its natural setting between Lake Zell and the Hohe Tauern mountains.
items.title_en: Zell am See Named One of Europe’s Most Beautiful Small Towns
items.title_original: Das ist die schönste Kleinstadt Österreichs - Vienna.at

items.raw_excerpt: Mietshaus in Oerlikon klagt gegen Zins-Erhöhung, Multi fürchtet um Entlarvung unzulässiger Kettenmiet-Verträge, gibt nach.

items.raw_excerpt: Stockholm’s 30,000-strong archipelago is rightly famous, but the sandy beaches and cabins just down the coast are more accessible and full of local flavour
items.summary_en: The piece highlights sandy beaches and cabins along the mainland coast near Stockholm as an accessible alternative to the city’s famous archipelago. It focuses on local atmosphere and small-scale travel experiences rather than major events.
items.title_en: A Taste of Swedish Island Life on the Mainland Near Stockholm
items.title_original: A taste of Swedish island life – but on the mainland, near Stockholm - The Guardian

items.raw_excerpt: Retail property developer Tipalea Partners has acquired a significant development site from Bunnings in Stony Rise and has announced plans to develop a new $40 million neighbourhood retail centre by 2024. The 3.3-hectare land parcel is prominently located on the corner of Stony Rise Road and Friend Street, adjacent to the Devonport Homemaker Centre, Tasmania. […]
items.summary_en: Tipalea Partners has acquired a 3.3-hectare development site from Bunnings in Stony Rise, near Devonport in Tasmania. The company plans to build a $40 million neighbourhood retail centre on the site by 2024.
items.title_en: Tipalea Plans New Retail Centre in Devonport, Tasmania
items.title_original: Tipalea to build new retail centre in Devonport, Tasmania - Shopping Centre News

items.raw_excerpt: I Den Gamle By i Aarhus kan du oppleve Danmark slik det var da H.C. Andersen levde. Nå blir også 2014 en del av historien.
items.summary_en: Den Gamle By in Aarhus lets visitors experience Denmark as it was when H.C. Andersen lived. The museum is now also making 2014 part of its historical story.

items.raw_excerpt: A famous swimming hole in a breathtaking Ontario village is officially ready to welcome in adventurers for the summer. Here’s what to know about the 2026 season at the Elora Quarry.
items.summary_en: Elora Quarry, a scenic limestone swimming hole in Ontario’s village of Elora, is getting ready to welcome summer visitors. The local travel piece highlights what adventurers should know for the 2026 season.
items.title_en: Elora Quarry swimming hole opens for the 2026 summer season
items.title_original: This picturesque 12-metre-high limestone swimming hole is about to open in Ontario’s most beautiful village - DurhamRegion.com

items.raw_excerpt: The animated award-winning cartoon series Bluey has been translated into Yolŋu Matha, from north-east Arnhem Land, for NAIDOC Week.

items.raw_excerpt: The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died.
items.summary_en: An iconic pine tree on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died. The tree was locally notable enough to be described as Finland's most famous pine.
items.title_en: Finland's most famous pine dies
items.title_original: Finland's most famous pine dies
